existing_cta.heading: Extend Data 360 by Using Custom Code
existing_cta.body: With code extension, you can bring your custom Python code into Data 360 to extend Data 360’s native capabilities. If native Data 360 features don’t meet your business requirements, deploy your custom logic across supported Data 360 features such as batch data transforms.
